LanguageData.Ammo_40x90mmGrenadeOE_HE.label: 40x90mm grenade OE (HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_40x90mmGrenadeOE_HE.description: Low velocity caseless grenade fired from handheld railgun grenade launchers.

LanguageData.Ammo_40x90mmGrenadeOE_HEAT.description: Low velocity caseless grenade fired from handheld railgun grenade launchers.
LanguageData.Ammo_40x90mmGrenadeOE_EMP.label: 40x90mm grenade OE (EMP)
LanguageData.Ammo_40x90mmGrenadeOE_EMP.description: Low velocity caseless grenade fired from handheld railgun grenade launchers.
LanguageData.Ammo_40x90mmGrenadeOE_Smoke.label: 40x90mm grenade OE (Smoke)
LanguageData.Ammo_40x90mmGrenadeOE_Smoke.description: Low velocity caseless grenade fired from handheld railgun grenade launchers.
